member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.VerifyBusiness(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Business)
member.summary: It is used for activation and verification of Business.

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.UploadFile(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: It is used to upload a new file and get a url.

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.SaveFaq(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Faq)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "question" : "Biz Kimiz?", "questionEn": "Who Us?", "answer": "En iyisiyiz.", "answerEn": "We are the best.", "category": "Kayıt", "sortOrder": 1 }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.AdminController.UpdateFaq(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Faq)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "question": "Biz Kimiz?", "questionEn": "Who Us?", "answer": "En iyisiyiz.", "answerEn": "We are the best.", "category": "Kayıt", "sortOrder": 2 }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.GetInfoById(System.String)
member.summary: Get Business Info By Id (Brings only its own information)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.GetById(System.String)
member.summary: Get Business By Id (It also brings relationship table information)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.GetBusinessDetailsById(System.String)
member.summary: Get Business Details By Id (Can be used for business detail page.)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.GetBusinessDetailByNameForUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Get Business Detail By NameforUrl (Can be used for fast appointment page.)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.RequestModel.BusinessAdminSaveBusinessRequestModel)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "name" : "Mert Kuaför", "address" : "Merkez, Eski Büyükdere Cd. 37/B, 34416 Kağıthane/İstanbul", "website": "https://caregarden.app/", "mobileOrOnlineServiceOnly": false, "serviceIds": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000;00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001" "workerSizeType": 2 }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Business)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "name" : "Mert Kuaför", "address" : "Merkez, Eski Büyükdere Cd. 37/B, 34416 Kağıthane/İstanbul", "telephone" : "+905467335892", "latitude": "41.08611", "longitude": "29.00717", "city": "İstanbul", "province": "Kağıthane", "district": "Çeliktepe Mah.", "description": "Tesettür saç kesim, bakım, boya, kalıcı makyaj, microblading, manikür, pedikür, kaynak saç.", "descriptionEn": "Hijab haircut, care, coloring, permanent makeup, microblading, manicure, pedicure, hair welding.", "isFeatured": true, "logoUrl": "safdsf.jpg", "hasPromotion": true }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessPropertiesController.GetByBusinessIdWithKey(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get BusinessProperties By Business Id And Key

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessServicesController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.BusinessServiceModel)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "businessId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "serviceId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "name": "Saç Kesim", "nameEn": "Hair Cut", "spot": "Tam isteğinize göre bir saç kesime hazır olun.", "spotEn": "Get ready for a haircut just to your liking.", "minDuration": 30, "maxDuration": 45, "price": 150 }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.BusinessServicesController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.BusinessServiceModel)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "businessId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "serviceId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "name": "Saç Kesim", "nameEn": "Hair Cut", "spot": "Tam isteğinize göre bir saç kesime hazır olun.", "spotEn": "Get ready for a haircut just to your liking.", "minDuration": 30, "maxDuration": 45, "price": 150, "isPopular": true }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.CommentController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Comment)
member.summary: Save Comment (İşyeri cevabı ise replyId dolu olacak. Cevap verilen yorumun id si yazılması yeterli. Kullanıcı yorum yapmışsa businessId dolu olmalı.)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "userId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "businessId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "appointmentId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "replyId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "comment" : "Harika bir hizmet teşekkürler.", "point" : 5 "aspectsOfPoint" : "1~2", "workerPoint" : 5 "aspectsOfWorkerPoint" : "1~2", "isShowProfile": true }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.CommentController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Comment)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "comment" : "Harika bir hizmet teşekkürler.", "point" : 5 "aspectsOfPoint" : "1~2", "workerPoint" : 5 "aspectsOfWorkerPoint" : "1~2", "isShowProfile": true }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.DiscountController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Discount)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "businessId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "isActive": true, "description": "Bugün tüm servislerde", "descriptionEn": "Every services today", "rate": 20, "type": 0, "colorCode": "#335657" }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.DiscountController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Discount)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "isActive": false, "description": "Bugün tüm servislerde", "descriptionEn": "Every services today", "rate": 20, "type": 0, "colorCode": "#335657" }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.FavoriteController.Get
member.summary: Get Favorite Businesses By Session User

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.NotificationController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Notification)
member.summary: Save Notification (Publish Date is the date the notification will start to appear. If null, it will appear immediately.)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "userId": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "businessId": null, "publishDate": "2024-03-29T08:30:00", "title": "BİLGİLENDİRME", "titleEn": "INFORMATION", "description": "CareGarden' a hoşgeldin.", "description": "CareGarden' a hoşgeldin.", "type": 0, "redirectId": null, "redirectUrl": null }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.NotificationController.SaveAllUsers(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Notification)
member.summary: Save Notification All Users (Publish Date is the date the notification will start to appear. If null, it will appear immediately.)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "publishDate": "2024-03-29T08:30:00", "title": "BİLGİLENDİRME", "titleEn": "INFORMATION", "description": "CareGarden' a hoşgeldin." "descriptionEn": "Welcome to CareGarden." "type": 0 "redirectId": null, "redirectUrl": null }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.NotificationController.SaveAllBusinesses(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Notification)
member.summary: Save Notification All Businesses (Publish Date is the date the notification will start to appear. If null, it will appear immediately.)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "publishDate": "2024-03-29T08:30:00", "title": "BİLGİLENDİRME", "titleEn": "INFORMATION", "description": "CareGarden' a hoşgeldin." "descriptionEn": "Welcome to CareGarden." "type": 0 "redirectId": null, "redirectUrl": null }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.NotificationController.SetRead(CareGardenApiV1.Model.RequestModel.IdListSearchRequestModel)
member.summary: Notification Set Read ({} boş gönderildiğinde session daki kullanıcının tüm bildirimleri okundu yapar.)

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.WorkerController.GetByBusinessServiceId(System.String)
member.summary: Get Worker By Business Service Id

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.WorkerController.Save(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Worker)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "name" : "Mert DEMİRKIRAN", "title" : "Hair Stylist", "titleEn" : "Hair Stylist", "about" : "Lorem ipsum", "aboutEn" : "Lorem ipsum", "path" : "mert.jpg", "businessId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "serviceIds" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000;00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001", "mondayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "tuesdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "wednesdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "thursdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "fridayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "saturdayWorkHours" : "09:00-13:00", "sundayWorkHours" : null, }

member.name: M:CareGardenApiV1.Controller.WorkerController.Update(CareGardenApiV1.Model.TableModel.Worker)
member.remarks:
**Sample request body:**
{ "id" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "name" : "Mert DEMİRKIRAN", "title" : "Hair Stylist", "titleEn" : "Hair Stylist", "about" : "Lorem ipsum", "aboutEn" : "Lorem ipsum", "path" : "mert.jpg", "businessId" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000", "serviceIds" : "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000;00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001", "mondayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "tuesdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "wednesdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "thursdayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "fridayWorkHours" : "09:00-21:00", "saturdayWorkHours" : "09:00-13:00", "sundayWorkHours" : null, "isActive" : true }

member.summary: Get Worker Service Price By Id

member.name: T:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.AllMessagesRead
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Tüm mesajlar okundu olarak işaretlendi..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.Anonymous
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Anonim.

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.AppointmentAvailable
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Seçtiğiniz tarihte bir randevu alındığı için randevu yapılamadı. Lütfen başka bir tarih seçerek tekrar deneyiniz..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.AppointmentCancelled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Randevu başarıyla iptal edildi..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.AppointmentCancelWarning
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Randevuya 9 saat kala randevuyu iptal etmek, güvenilirliğinizi azaltabilir. İptal etmek istiyor musunuz?.

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.AppointmentNotCancelled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Randevunun iptal edilmesi sırasında bir hata oluştu..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.AppointmentStatusChanged
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Randevunun durumu başarıyla güncellendi..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.AppointmentStatusNotChanged
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Randevunun durumu güncellenirken bir hata oluştu..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.BusinessFoundEnteredMail
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz e-posta adresine ait kayıtlı bir işletme bulunmaktadır..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.BusinessFoundEnteredTelephone
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz telefon numarasına kayıtlı bir işletme bulunmaktadır..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to İşletme bulunamadı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz bilgilere ait bir işletme bulunamadı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz e-posta adresine ait işletme bulunamadı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to İşletme doğrulanamadı..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.BusinessVerified
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to İşletme doğrulandı..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ColorCodeErrorMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Renk kodu 3 veya 6 haneli olmalı..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ConfirmationCodeExpired
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Onay kodunun süresi doldu. Lütfen yeni bir kod isteyin..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ConfirmationCodeForAppointment
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Randevuyu tamamlamak için onay kodu {0}..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ConfirmationCodeMessageInOneMinute
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bir dakika içinde birden fazla onay kodu alamazsınız..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ConfirmationCodeNotSend
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Onay kodu gönderilemedi..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Onay kodu doğrulanamadı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Onay kodu doğrulandı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lütfen güncel şifrenizi doğru giriniz..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Tarih aralağı maximum bir ay olmalıdır..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Elastic indexleme işlemi arkaplanda başlamıştır..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyiniz veya destek ekibimizle iletişime geçiniz..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bir hata oluştu..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Geri bildirim gönderilemedi..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Geri bildiriminiz gönderildi. Teşekkür ederiz!.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Geçerli bir id gönderilmediğinden dolayı istek işlenemedi..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Resim yüklenirken bir hata oluştu..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Resim başarılı bir şekilde yüklendi. .

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Konum bilginiz güncellendi..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Giriş yapılamadı..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Giriş başarılı..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.NotEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bu alanı boş bırakmayınız..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.NotPermission
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bu işlemi gerçekleştirmek için yetkiniz yok. Lütfen gerekli izinler için sistem yöneticinizle iletişime geçiniz..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.PasswordMustBeEightCharacters
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Şifre en az 8 karakter olmalı..

member.name: P:CareGardenApiV1.Resource.Resource.PasswordResetLinkExpired
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Şifre sıfırlama bağlantısı süresi doldu. Lütfen bir şifre sıfırlama bağlantısı talep edin..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bir saat içinde birden fazla şifre yenileme bağlantısı alamazsınız..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password reset link not found..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Şifre yenileme bağlantısı gönderildi..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Girdiğiniz şifreler birbiriyle eşleşmiyor..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Popüler Servisler.
